name: Kumar Krishnamoorthy
title: Senior Software Engineer | FullStack Architect | AI Engineer
summary: 15+ years building scalable full-stack systems with deep expertise in frontend architecture, React ecosystems, and applied AI. Led platform-level decisions at scale — component libraries, micro-frontends, SSR pipelines. Recently building agentic AI systems with MCP, ReAct loops, and human-in-the-loop orchestration.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Architect
bullets: Architected a micro-frontend platform using Webpack Module Federation serving 3M+ MAU — reduced team coupling and enabled independent deployments across 6 squads
Built a design system and component library (100+ components) adopted across 4 product lines, cutting UI dev time by 40%
Migrated monolithic React app to Next.js App Router with ISR/SSR — improved Core Web Vitals LCP from 4.2s to 1.1s
Led AI integration initiative: embedded Claude-powered trade explainability panel using Anthropic SDK and MCP tools
Mentored 5 engineers, ran architecture review board, and defined frontend coding standards across the org

experience.title: FullStack Engineer
bullets: Built real-time dashboard with React + FastAPI + WebSockets visualising 10K events/sec from Kafka pipeline
Designed and shipped GraphQL API layer (Apollo + Node.js) replacing 12 fragmented REST endpoints, reducing client payload sizes by 60%
Implemented end-to-end testing strategy with Playwright achieving 85% critical-path coverage
Reduced Docker build times by 70% through multi-stage build optimization and layer caching strategy

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Delivered 8 client-facing web applications using React/Node.js with product teams of 3–8 engineers
Built internal CMS platform reducing content update turnaround from 2 days to 20 minutes
Introduced automated testing (Jest + Enzyme) on legacy codebase, reducing regression incidents by 55%

projects.name: AI Researcher for Trading
projects.description: Agentic AI system with MCP architecture for automated equity research and signal generation
bullets: Built 4 MCP servers (data, analysis, news, portfolio) with stdio transport — independently testable and crash-isolated
Implemented ReAct agent loop using Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514 with tool-use for multi-step research tasks
FastAPI orchestrator with asyncio HITL gates and SSE push to Next.js dashboard for human-in-the-loop control
PostgreSQL state machine tracking research sessions, signal history, and agent decision logs
